title: 'There's no safety anymore': Palestinians warn of expanding West Bank settler violence
summary_full: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.
summary_public: There has been a surge of attacks by Israeli settlers on Palestinian villages across the occupied territory since the start of the Iran war.
